title: Compulsory English course Exemption Exam Placement -Student List
content:
Compulsory English course Exemption Exam Placement -Student List

In order to find out in which campus and classroom you will take the Compulsory English Course Exemption Exam, which will be held on Tuesday, October 18, you need to find your student number by downloading the attached excel file. Since there are too many students in the list, you should use your computer, press the CTRL+F keys on your keyboard at the same time, write your student number in the box that appears and then click the button "Find". Before taking the exam, you must read the exam announcement carefully. In addition, exam lists and exam announcement are shared on STIX and LMS. Good luck in the exam!

IMPORTANT NOTE:

STUDENTS, WHO HAVE ALREADY TAKEN THE RELATED ENGLISH COURSES AND FAILED IN FORMER YEARS OR WHO WISH TO INCREASE THEIR PREVIOUS ENGLISH GRADES, CANNOT ATTEND THIS EXEMPTION EXAM AGAIN. THEY’LL BE REMOVED AND THEIR GRADES ARE NOT BE VALID. THESE STUDENTS NEED TO RETAKE THE ENGLISH COURSE THEY PREVIOUSLY FAILED IN OR PASSED WITH LOW LETTER GRADES.

click below for the list

TÜRKÇE LİSANS BÖLÜMLERİ İNGİLİZCE DERSİ (ING101-102) MUAFİYET SINAVI LİSTELERİ.xlsx
